headline: What to Do When the Insurance Company Cuts Off Your Benefits
articleBody: It’s a classic move: the insurance company stops your checks because their 'independent' doctor says you’re healed. If you’re still in pain and can’t work, don't panic. You have the right to a second opinion and a hearing to contest their findings. This is usually where things get legal and messy, so having a focused expert in your corner makes a huge difference.
